message:
fix: use BackendPort in backendURL() when set for watchdog mode (#3362) (#3387)

backendURL() always returned s.config.Port, but in watchdog mode the server
listens on BackendPort. This caused OAuth callback URLs to point to the wrong
port. Now backendURL() checks BackendPort > 0 and uses it when set.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
